kernel_subject: net: dev: Makes sure netif_rx() can be invoked in any context.
stage1_reason: Direct replacement of netif_rx_ni() with netif_rx() due to kernel API change documented in commit baebdf48c3600 allowing netif_rx() in any context
stage2_reason: Driver commit e77975e02b59 replaces netif_rx_ni() with netif_rx() directly referencing kernel API change allowing netif_rx() in any context, matching baebdf48c360's documented purpose.
